name: score-converter
displayDescription: Vietnamese university admission score calculator web app. Needed because Vietnamese admissions use multiple complex scoring methods that are hard to compare manually. Works by converting and cross-referencing scores across 4 methods: high school GPA, national exam (THPTQG), aptitude tests (DGNL/TSA), with percentile tables and real-time auto-calculation. Contains a single-page React app with score computation engine and percentile lookup tables. Used by high school students and parents comparing admission chances. Built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS.
